height_to_width.desc: 主体高度/面宽（大殿面阔七间、平坐较低）

depth_to_width.desc: 进深/面宽（四间深 / 七间阔 ≈ 0.57）

roof_to_body_height.desc: 屋顶高度/主体高度（庑殿顶大屋顶）

bay_count_x.desc: 面阔开间数（佛光寺东大殿七开间）

window_wall_ratio.desc: 窗洞占比（实墙+柱网为主）

aiInstruction: Foguang Temple East Hall (Tang timber frame, 7-bay × 4-bay, single-eave wudian roof). Compositional LlmPlan: alignment_and_symmetry rhythm_x with 7 equal bays, rhythm_z with 4 bays; MASS_MAIN width:depth≈7:4, height modest (one story hall), params.facade_profile=vertical_pilasters, roof_type=xuanshan with large overhang. FOUNDATION stone platform + optional TERRACE plinth. DECOR_DETAIL column/bracket bands (dougong/bracket_sets); perimeter column rhythm. style_profile Tang_Dynasty_Timber or Chinese_Traditional; wall=wood/red_lacquer, roof=grey_tile. FORBID: CROWN/CLASSICAL_CUPOLA, small cottage/cube, classical_monument pilaster-only without timber bracket expression, stone fortress mass. No dedicated MODULE yet — research + proportion-driven compositional plan.
